media.altText: Lijiang Old Town rooftops with Jade Dragon Snow Mountain in the background

sections.subtitle: Complete Lijiang Old Town Experience
sections.text: After your pickup at 9 AM, we start with the Heritage Museum and then walk the Black Dragon Pond park. After a traditional lunch we will spend the afternoon writing Dongba pictographs and crafting traditional paper. Later on, we'll visit Mu Palace among other historical landmarks, and end the day with Lijiang specialty dinner and Naxi Ancient Music. You'll come home with the Old Town's full rhythm in your bones.

items.title: What's Special
items.subtitle: The whole Old Town in one day
items.highlight: A complete day of museums, workshops, palaces, markets, traditional meals and live music — all in one guided deep-dive

items.title: Duration
items.subtitle: One Day
items.highlight: Full Day: 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM (12 hours)

items.title: Location
items.subtitle: Lijiang Old Town
items.highlight: Lijiang Old Town UNESCO World Heritage Site | Altitude 2,400m

badge.label: The Whole Old Town in One Day

items.title: Visit Lijiang Heritage Museum
items.subtitle: Lijiang Heritage Museum
items.text: Begin at the Lijiang Heritage Museum, the best single introduction to Naxi history, Dongba script, and the UNESCO Old Town's centuries of trade. A great way to anchor the day before stepping out into the streets.

image.altText: Exhibit inside the Lijiang Heritage Museum

items.title: Cross Black Dragon Pond Park
items.subtitle: Black Dragon Pool
items.text: Walk through Black Dragon Pond Park at the foot of Jade Dragon Snow Mountain. Crystal-clear spring water, a tiny island pavilion, the famous Moon-Arch Bridge — and a quiet moment with the mountain in full view.

image.altText: Black Dragon Pond Park with Jade Dragon Snow Mountain in background

items.title: Stroll across the Old Town
items.subtitle: Dayan Old Town
items.text: Wander the cobblestone lanes of Dayan Old Town with a guide who knows which corners to duck into. From a quiet Naxi courtyard to a hidden backstreet well, this is the Old Town at its most human.

image.altText: Cobblestone lanes of Dayan Old Town

items.title: Crossing Bridge Noodles
items.subtitle: 過橋米線
items.text: Lunch is a bowl of legendary noodles — the Yunnan dish with the story: rice noodles, piping-hot broth, and a tray of fresh toppings you add at the table. A local institution and a delicious way to slow down midday.

image.altText: Bowl of crossing bridge noodles in Lijiang

items.title: Write Dongba Hieroglyphs
items.subtitle: Dongba Workshop
items.text: Take a brush and learn to draw a few of the ancient Dongba pictographs under the guidance of a local heritage expert. You'll leave with your own calligraphy.

image.altText: Brush and paper for writing Dongba pictographs

items.title: Meet Heritage Experts
items.subtitle: Naxi Culture Keepers
items.text: Sit down with the Naxi culture keepers who run the workshops — descendants of Dongba priests, paper makers, and Old Town historians — and hear what it means to keep a written tradition alive in the 21st century.

image.altText: Naxi heritage expert explaining Dongba tradition

items.title: Craft Dongba Paper
items.subtitle: Handmade Paper
items.text: Try your hand at the traditional Dongba paper-making process — a slow, meditative craft using local plant fibers. Bring a sheet of the ancient hand-made paper home with you and create a calligraphy masterpiece of your own.

items.title: Join Heritage Scavenger Hunt
items.subtitle: Game Through the Old Town
items.text: Take part in a guided heritage scavenger hunt through the backstreets: clues lead you past centuries-old wells, a quiet ancestral hall, a tucked-away temple, and the neighbourhood's best photo spot. A playful way to see the Old Town most visitors never find.

image.altText: Quiet backstreet alley during a heritage scavenger hunt in Lijiang

items.title: Visit the Mu Palace
items.subtitle: 木府
items.text: Step into the Mu Palace (木府), the former seat of the Naxi chieftains who ruled the region for nearly 400 years during the Ming and Qing dynasties. Marble thrones, carved beams, and a small museum that ties the whole day together.

image.altText: Mu Palace (木府) courtyard in Lijiang Old Town

items.title: Delight in Lijiang Specialty Dinner
items.subtitle: Local Cuisine
items.text: Sit down for a relaxed Lijiang specialty dinner — a multi-dish Naxi meal that may include cured pork, wild mushroom hotpot, hand-made tofu, and pu-er tea shrimps. A proper, unhurried introduction to mountain home cooking.

items.title: Immerse in Ancient Naxi Music
items.subtitle: Naxi Ancient Music
items.text: Enjoy the evening performance of Naxi Ancient Music — a UNESCO-recognised tradition that blends Tang, Song, and local Dongba instrumentation. About an hour of music, in a courtyard, with the mountain night behind you.

image.altText: Naxi Ancient Music performance in a courtyard

items.title: Visit Night Market
items.subtitle: Evening Market
items.text: End the day at Lijiang's night market, where the Old Town lights up and locals come out to shop, snack, and dance in the squares. A great window into how the city unwinds after dark.

days.title: A Full Day Inside the Naxi Old Town

activities: Meet your guide at your Lijiang hotel at 9:00 AM and head straight to the Lijiang Heritage Museum for a focused introduction to Naxi history, Dongba culture, and the Old Town's centuries of trade. Walk next door into Black Dragon Pond Park for the spring water, the Moon-Arch Bridge, and the full Jade Dragon Snow Mountain view. Stroll back into Dayan Old Town through the cobblestone lanes — ducking into quiet courtyards and backstreet wells with a guide who knows the alleyways. By lunchtime you're ready for a proper bowl of crossing-bridge noodles at a local institution.

After lunch, take part in heritage workshops. Meet the Naxi heritage keepers and learn to draw the ancient Dongba pictographs and craft traditional local paper. Take part in a guided heritage scavenger hunt through the backstreets that lead past centuries-old wells, tucked-away temples, and the neighbourhood's best photo spots. End the afternoon at the Mu Palace, the former seat of the Naxi chieftains.

Sit down for an unhurried Lijiang specialty dinner —a real introduction to mountain home cooking. Immerse in a one-hour performance of Naxi Ancient Music in a courtyard — a UNESCO-recognised tradition that blends Tang, Song, and Dongba instrumentation. Close the night with a stroll around the lit-up Old Town night market as the squares fill with dancers and snack vendors. Your guide will drop you back at your Lijiang hotel around 9:00 PM.

contactNote.text: For groups of 1 person or more than 6 people

included.text: English-Speaking Coordinator/Guide (Lynne Lyu or Lukasz Madrzynski), Local Dongba Heritage Experts, All Entrance Fees (Heritage Museum, Black Dragon Pond Park, Mu Palace), Dongba Workshop Materials, Crossing-Bridge Noodles Lunch, Lijiang Specialty Dinner, Naxi Ancient Music Performance, Outdoor Travel Insurance.
included.notIncluded: Personal Expenses (Souvenirs, etc.), Voluntary Gratuities for the Guide
included.meetingPoint: Pickup: 9:00 AM at your Lijiang hotel | Return: Approximately 9:00 PM to your Lijiang hotel

sections.subtitle: Click on a question to reveal the answer

items.question: What should I bring?
items.answer: Comfortable walking shoes, layers for changing temperatures, raincoat or umbrella for cloudy days, sun protection, a water bottle, and your camera.

items.question: Is this suitable for children?
items.answer: Yes! This tour is family-friendly. Children under 12 should be accompanied by an adult. The 7-8 km walk is at a slow pace with frequent stops, achievable for most ages. The scavenger hunt in particular is a hit with kids.

items.question: What's the cancellation policy?
items.answer: Full refund if cancelled 7+ days before the tour. 50% refund for 3-6 days. No refund within 48 hours. Weather contingencies always have alternatives or rescheduling.

items.question: What happens if it rains?
items.answer: The tour runs in light rain. For heavy storms we'll shorten the outdoor activities and spend more time indoors (museums, palaces, workshops etc.).

items.question: Are there any physical requirements?
items.answer: Basic mobility is enough. You'll walk 7-8 km on flat cobblestone streets at a slow pace, with frequent stops for storytelling, museum time, and meals. The full day is long (12 hours) so a reasonable level of stamina helps, but we will adjust the pace to your preferences.

items.question: How do I get to the meeting point?
items.answer: We provide pickup from any hotel in Lijiang Old Town or the surrounding area. If you're staying outside Lijiang, please contact us to arrange an alternative meeting point.

items.question: What language do the guides speak?
items.answer: We are fluent in English, Polish and Chinese.

items.question: How does this trip support conservation and sustainable development?
items.answer: Each booking directly supports the Naxi heritage workshops, museums, the music ensemble, and the local food partners featured on the day. Part of your fee goes to supporting the heritage preservation practitioners of the Dongba script and paper-making traditions, and the small-group format (max 6) keeps the experience intimate and ensures your fees stay with the Old Town community.

title.text: Ready to Spend a Full Day in the Old Town?

seo.metaTitle: Lijiang Heritage In-Depth Tour | Full-Day Yunnan Naxi Culture Experience
seo.metaDescription: Spend a full day inside Lijiang UNESCO Old Town in Yunnan, China: Heritage Museum, Black Dragon Pond, Dongba pictograph workshop, Mu Palace, Wenchang Palace, and Naxi Ancient Music. Small-group Yunnan cultural tour.
